global.description: The ad features a bold logo and a clear call to action for a flash sale.
global.main_message: Promoting a limited-time flash sale for CrispBox.

elements.label: CrispBox logo
elements.description: A large, bold logo with the text 'CrispBox' prominently displayed in white against a purple background.

elements.label: Flash sale announcement
elements.description: A medium-sized text in white that reads 'Flash sale live' with a slight shadow effect, set against a purple background.

elements.label: Weekend offer details
elements.description: A smaller text in white stating 'Only this weekend' positioned below the main sale announcement.

elements.label: Sale price
elements.description: A bold, eye-catching price tag displaying '€19.99' in white, set against a purple background.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Start now' in black on a white background, designed to attract clicks.

elements.label: Circular icon
elements.description: A small circular icon in light gray, positioned to the left of the price tag, adding a decorative touch.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small, rectangular shape in light gray, possibly a decorative element or placeholder.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A medium-sized rectangular shape in light gray, possibly a decorative element or placeholder.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A medium-sized rectangular shape in light gray, possibly a decorative element or placeholder.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A tall, narrow rectangular shape in light gray, possibly a decorative element or placeholder.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A large headline text in white that reads 'CrispBox' at the top of the ad, set against a purple background.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: A solid purple background that fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant backdrop for the text and elements.
elements.text_content: Flash sale live Only this weekend €19.99 Start now
